ab: Miyah ka mtgsa da.
en: The teacher is here.

ab: Iya rawa duri ha, Usa tluung tleegan nhari hiya.
ch: B:不要再玩了，快坐在座位上。
en: Stop playing and quickly sit in your seat.

ab: Ini ta kla, qsuqi ku dhuq da!
en: Sorry, I’m late!

ab: Iyah mtmay nhari.
en: Come in quickly.

ab: Tgpiya jiyax iyax sngayan ka sayang hug?
en: What day is it today?

ab: Tgrima jiyax iyax sngayan ka sayang, jiyax sngayan ka saman, seupu ta mrawa ngangut kana ha!
ch: B:今天星期五，明天放假，一起出去玩吧!
en: It’s Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let’s go out and play together!

ab: Duwa o! Jita yayung hiya.
en: Great! Let’s go to the riverside.

ab: Tgpiya jiyax iyax sngayan ka saman?
en: What day will it be tomorrow?

ab: Tgtru jiyax iyax sngayan ka saman, Jita hmrapas gurug ka babaw ska hidaw saman ha!
ch: B:明天星期三，我們明天下午去玩球吧!
en: Tomorrow will be Wednesday. Let’s go play ball tomorrow afternoon!

ab: Mgrbu saman o mmanu ka qpahun su hug?
en: What will you be doing tomorrow morning?

ab: Jiyax sngayan ka saman, mowsa ku Pnrhulan tuhuy bubu mu.
ch: B:明天是星期日，我要和媽媽去教會。
en: Tomorrow will be Sunday, I will be going to church with my mom.

ab: Hmuya su da hug?
en: What’s wrong?

ab: Qntpbrih ku, mha ku ngangut han.
en: I feel like vomiting. I need to go to the restroom.

ab: Tkuni bi ka tunux mu.
en: I feel dizzy.

ab: Usa sangay knrikit ka isu.
en: Lie down and rest.

ab: Mtgsa, mnarux buyas mu, mha ku ngangut han.
ch: A:老師，我肚子痛，要去廁所。
en: Teacher, I have a stomachache. I need to go to the restroom.

ab: Tduwa o, usa nhari.
en: Okay, go quickly.

ab: Tduwa ku musa trima baga hug?
en: May I go wash my hands?

ab: Aji biyaw malax matas da, usa kiya duri.
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: Mtgsa, mnarux tunux mu, sangay ku babaw kndaxan han.
ch: A:老師，我頭好痛，下午要請假。
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: Iq wa, qlahang musa sapah.
en: Okay, take care and go home.

ab: Msangay ku bukuy tgkingal jiyax iyax sngayan, mha ku pqita empsapuh.
ch: A:老師我下禮拜一要請假，我要去看醫生。
en: Teacher, I need to take a sick leave next Monday. I have to see a doctor.

ab: Iq o, qlahang nanak hiyi.
en: Alright, take care of yourself.

ab: Gaga inu ka Iwal hug?
en: Where is Iwal?

ab: Mnarux buyas na, ga ngangut ka hiya.
en: She has a stomachache. She’s in the restroom.

ab: Gaga inu ka Rudaw hug?
en: Where is Rudaw?

ab: Mtgsa, mnarux glu na ka Rudaw, ga msangay ka sayang.
en: Teacher, Rudaw has a sore throat. She took a sick leave today.

ab: Ma ini iyah ka Iwal hug?
en: Why didn’t Iwal come?

ab: Mnarux tunux na da.
en: She has a fever.
